title: Frontend Canvas
description: A clean product-minded starter built from real platform tooling repositories and repo2site’s own portfolio generation flow.
sourceLabel: Inspired by real-world repositories from the Vercel ecosystem

exampleProjects.name: vercel/next.js
exampleProjects.description: Used by some of the world's largest companies, Next.js enables you to create full-stack web applications by extending the latest React features, and integrating powerful Rust-based JavaScript tooling for the fastest builds.

exampleProjects.name: vercel/hyper
exampleProjects.description: The goal of the project is to create a beautiful and extensible experience for command-line interface users, built on open web standards. In the beginning, our focus will be primarily around speed, stability and the development of the correct API for extension authors.

exampleProjects.name: vercel/swr
exampleProjects.description: The name “**SWR**” is derived from stale-while-revalidate, a cache invalidation strategy popularized by HTTP RFC 5861. **SWR** first returns the data from cache (stale), then sends the request (revalidate), and finally comes with the up-to-date data again.
